request:

expected_interpretation.rootCause: No initiators are configured for the requested CLASS; the job sat on the input queue.
expected_interpretation.suggestedFix: Submit under a class with active initiators or ask the scheduler to start one for class Z.
expected_interpretation.explanation: The job entered execution and progressed until the failure surfaced. No initiators are configured for the requested CLASS; the job sat on the input queue. Submit under a class with active initiators or ask the scheduler to start one for class Z.

IEF142I RPTGEN01 STEP01        - STEP WAS EXECUTED - COND CODE 0016
$HASP395 RPTGEN01    ENDED - RC=0016

expected_interpretation.summary: Job RPTGEN01 step STEP01 ended with an inconclusive failure (RC=0016).
expected_interpretation.rootCause: Step was flushed by a prior step's COND= and reported an unusual code.
expected_interpretation.suggestedFix: Open the step's joblog and any application-side logs to identify the underlying error.
expected_interpretation.explanation: The step began processing and then halted on the condition described below. Step was flushed by a prior step's COND= and reported an unusual code. Open the step's joblog and any application-side logs to identify the underlying error.

IEF142I RECONJOB REPORT        - STEP WAS EXECUTED - COND CODE 000C
$HASP395 RECONJOB    ENDED - RC=000C

expected_interpretation.summary: Job RECONJOB step REPORT ended with an inconclusive failure (RC=000C).
expected_interpretation.rootCause: Step was flushed by a prior step's COND= and reported an unusual code.
expected_interpretation.suggestedFix: Open the step's joblog and any application-side logs to identify the underlying error.
expected_interpretation.explanation: The step began processing and then halted on the condition described below. Step was flushed by a prior step's COND= and reported an unusual code. Open the step's joblog and any application-side logs to identify the underlying error.

request:
$HASP373 ACCTBTCH    STARTED
SMART-RESTART  EVAL  STEP=SORT
SMART-RESTART  CATEGORY=resource_unavailable
SMART-RESTART  DETAIL=DB2 subsystem not reachable; retry advised.
IEF142I ACCTBTCH SORT        - STEP WAS NOT EXECUTED - COND CODE 0010
$HASP395 ACCTBTCH    ENDED - RC=0010

expected_interpretation.summary: Smart Restart flagged step SORT as blocked by DB2 subsystem.
expected_interpretation.rootCause: Required external resource (DB2 subsystem) was unavailable at step start; not a code defect.
expected_interpretation.suggestedFix: Confirm DB2 subsystem health, then resubmit; Smart Restart can re-drive the step automatically.
expected_interpretation.explanation: Execution started normally and ran up to the point of failure. Required external resource (DB2 subsystem) was unavailable at step start; not a code defect. Confirm DB2 subsystem health, then resubmit; Smart Restart can re-drive the step automatically.
